question: The pilot NASA assigned to Artemis III in June 2026 — which space agency does he belong to?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer: The pilot assigned to Artemis III in June 2026, **Luca Parmitano**, belongs to the **European Space Agency (ESA)** — he is an Italian ESA astronaut, marking the first time a European has been assigned to an Artemis crew ([Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artemis_III); [NPR](https://www.npr.org/2026/06/09/nx-s1-5851860/nasa-artemis-iii-crew); [SpaceDaily](https://spacedaily.com/sd-on-june-9-2026-nasa-named-italian-astronaut-luca-parmitano-as-pilot-of-artemis-3-making-him-the-first-european-ever-assigned-to-an-artemis-crew-and-within-hours-esas-director-general/)).

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
He belongs to the **European Space Agency (ESA)**. The pilot is Italian astronaut **Luca Parmitano**.  
Source: [ESA](https://www.esa.int/ESA_Multimedia/Videos/2026/06/Artemis_III_NASA_announcement_highlights_Luca_Parmitano_assigned_as_pilot)
